q: What is the primary role of the cerebellum in body integration?
options: Controlling conscious decision-making and language production
Regulating heart rate and breathing via the autonomic nervous system
Coordinating smooth, precise muscle movement and maintaining balance
Processing visual input from the retina and directing eye movement
explanation: The cerebellum receives sensory input about body position and compares it to intended movement commands, fine-tuning motor output to produce coordinated, accurate motion.
